name: narrative-campaign-scan-v1
description: Scheduled proactive disinformation campaign detector: clusters recent claims, scores for coordinated inauthentic behaviour, triggers investigator on high-CIB clusters.

steps.name: claim-cluster-scan
steps.prompt_template: MODE 1: SCHEDULED CLUSTER SCAN. Query ontology for all claims ingested in the past 72 hours. Group by actor, hashtag_cluster, geopolitical_event, narrative_fingerprint. For each cluster of 3+ related claims: compute NarrativeCluster score and CIB indicators. Return array of NarrativeCluster JSON objects sorted by cib_score descending.

steps.name: high-cib-triage
steps.prompt_template: Filter narrative clusters with cib_score >= 0.75: {{narrative_clusters}}. For each high-CIB cluster: validate the CIB indicators are distinct (not duplicates of prior alerts). Rank by estimated reach and harm potential. Return filtered and ranked list with investigator_brief for each.

steps.name: investigator-dispatch
steps.prompt_template: For each cluster in high_cib_clusters: {{high_cib_clusters}}, dispatch investigator agent with the cluster brief. Trigger workflow: investigative-report-generation for each cluster_id. Also update ontology NarrativeCluster nodes with latest cib_scores from: {{narrative_clusters}}.
